item.title: Arch Linux 桌面配置
item.author: Author
item.description: My Archlinux desktop configuratoins Basic setup Desktop Environment KDE Bismuth Fonts Apple Developer fonts Wenquanyi Sarasa FiraCode Nerd mono App icons Tela Dotfiles Apply dotfiles from my own repo Softwares for daily use qView: image viewer thunar: graphical file manager ranger: console file manager Typora: writing articles Thunderbird: mail and rss client Yesplaymusic: music player Zotero: PDF/paper read and management
